Emily Reardon

Design for Futures That Love Us

  • CV

Emily Reardon is a designer, researcher, and creative technologist working across education, media, and participatory systems.

Her work explores how technology shapes learning, culture, and collective experience.

© 2026 Emily Reardon. Intentionally simple, designed for durability, and structured as a living system. Guided by open and ethical practices. Made with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Git.
